heading: Introduction
text: Welcome SequiaViz documentationвҖҰ

heading: How to install and run
text: install run SequiaViz, follow steps:Install required R packages.Set directory structure.Upload data files.

heading: Input file types and formats
text: SequiaViz integrates results four types genomic datasets:

heading: 1. Somatic Variant Calling
text:
Exploration visualization somatic mutations tumor samplesRequired files:
.tsv | .vcf file annotated variants (.vcf implemented yet)
.tsv | .vcf file annotated variants (.vcf implemented yet)Optional files (needed IGV visualization):
Tumor DNA .bam + .bai files
Normal DNA .bam + .bai files
Tumor mutational burden (TMB) .tsv | .xlsx | .txt file
Tumor DNA .bam + .bai filesNormal DNA .bam + .bai filesTumor mutational burden (TMB) .tsv | .xlsx | .txt file

heading: 2. Germline Variant Calling
text:
Exploration visualization germline mutations normal samplesRequired files:
.tsv | .vcf file annotated variants (.vcf implemented yet)
.tsv | .vcf file annotated variants (.vcf implemented yet)Optional files (needed IGV visualization):
Normal .bam + .bai files
Normal .bam + .bai files

heading: 3. Fusion Genes Detection
text:
Exploration visualization gene fusions RNA-seq dataRequired files:
.tsv | .xlsx files detected genes fusion (.tsv implemented yet)
.tsv | .xlsx files detected genes fusion (.tsv implemented yet)Optional files (needed IGV visualization row expansion preview):
Tumor RNA .bam + .bai files
Chimeric .bam + .bai files
Arriba .pdf + .tsv files (embedded report display quality metrics)
Tumor RNA .bam + .bai filesChimeric .bam + .bai filesArriba .pdf + .tsv files (embedded report display quality metrics)

heading: 4. Expression Profile
text:
Exploration visualization gene expression different tissuesRequired files:
.tsv | .xlsx | .txt file expression data sample files tissue-matched reference expression data
.tsv | .xlsx | .txt file expression data sample files tissue-matched reference expression dataOptional files:
Genes interest (GOI) .tsv | .xlsx | .txt file
Genes interest (GOI) .tsv | .xlsx | .txt fileTip: can choose, always prioritize .tsv files .xlsx vcf files faster load process.

heading: General Rules
text: Use consistent naming across patientsAvoid special characters spacesUse underscores dots separatorsAll file names must unique within directoryAll per-patient files must patient ID dataset type (somatic, germline, fusion, expression|RNAseq) somewhere path nameExamples:Note: GOI TMB files considered per-patient files contain information samples

Select main directory containing data patients.

heading: Step 2: Validation and confirmation
text:
application searches selected directory identifies relevant files.displays overview files found patient selected dataset.marks problems using colored icons:
рҹҹў Green: required files found (e.g., variant file, fusion file, expression file).
рҹҹ  Orange: Optional files missing (e.g., BAM files IGV visualization). can continue without files, features unavailable.
рҹ”ҙ Red: Required files missing many files. must resolve issues proceeding. See Common Errors Solutions section help.
рҹҹў Green: required files found (e.g., variant file, fusion file, expression file).рҹҹ  Orange: Optional files missing (e.g., BAM files IGV visualization). can continue without files, features unavailable.рҹ”ҙ Red: Required files missing many files. must resolve issues proceeding. See Common Errors Solutions section help.Confirm configuration continueNote: realize Step 2 made mistake Step 1, can go back Step 1 using Back Selection button adjust configuration. didnвҖҷt make mistake notice files missing, can add directory rename needed. , use Refresh button search files .Tip: previously worked configuration saved session, can upload directly using Load Session button. allow application skip Selection Validation steps load configuration saved file.Caution: present, genes_of_interest.tsv mutation_loads.tsv files appear detected files patient, even though one file shared among patients.

heading: вҖңRequired file missingвҖқ
text:
Cause: required file selected analysis type missing.Solution:
- Verify file exists patient directory.
- Check file name ensure includes patient ID (pay special attention case sensitivity).
- Confirm file correct extension (e.g., .tsv, .xlsx).

heading: вҖңMultiple files foundвҖқ
text:
Cause: Multiple files type found single patient.Solution:
- Remove rename duplicate files.
- Ensure patient one file type.
- Review BAM file patterns ensure general.

heading: вҖңMissing BAM or BAIвҖқ
text:
Cause: BAM file missing corresponding index file (.bai).Solution:
- Generate missing .bai file using command samtools index.
- Ensure .bai file named correctly.
- example, BAM file file.bam, index file must file.bam.bai file.bai.

heading: вҖңMissing PDF or TSVвҖқ
вҖқ вҖң
text:
Cause: number tissues match number expression files found, tissue names matched files.Solution:
- Verify tissue corresponding expression file.
- Ensure tissue names configuration match file names (use underscores instead spaces, e.g., blood_vessel instead blood vessel).
- Double-check pairing tissues files validation step.

heading: Summary and Report
text: Summary Report module provides comprehensive overview user-selected oncogenic pathogenic variants, true-positive fusions, deregulated genes across modules. module designed streamline process generating clinical reports integrating findings entire analysis workflow.

heading: Overview of Features
text: dataset type color-coded easy identification:Somatic variants: Light greenGermline variants: Dark greenFusion genes: YellowRNA expression profiles: Blue

heading: Info Boxes
text: dataset info box summarizing key metrics findings analysis, providing quick overview results. value available, displayed вҖңN/вҖқ.

heading: Selected findings
text: section displays consolidated view flagged variants, fusions, deregulated genes selected previous modules. provides easy way review findings generating final report.Expandable boxes contain following details:

heading: Somatic and Germline Variant Calling
text: Box content: Gene name, variant type, ClinVar classification (available).Variant info: Location, Ref, Alt, HGVSc, HGVSp, Variant type.Frequency: Allelic frequency, GnomAD frequency.

heading: Fusion Genes Detection
text: Box content: Gene 1, Gene 2, Arriba confidence level.Fusion info: Gene 1, Gene 2, Position 1, Position 2, Strand 1, Strand 2.Frequency: Overall support, Arriba site.

heading: RNA Expression Profile
text: section expandable. contains summary flagged genes, including genes interest deregulated genes.

heading: Report Generation
text: Reports can generated using either predefined template user-uploaded custom template ensure report format aligns institutional regulatory requirements.

heading: Limitations
text: automatically generated report regarded draft rather final clinical document.Due limited access metadata challenge retrieving context-specific textual annotations variants, report requires manual review completion clinician.module ensures findings presented structured format suitable clinical interpretation.

heading: Creating Custom Templates
text: module supports keyword-based variable substitution populate report patient-specific findings.

heading: How to Use Keywords
text:
Insert Keywords: Place keywords .docx template want corresponding data appear.
Example:
Patient Information:
<<patient_info>>

Summary Somatic Variants:
<<summary_somatic>>

Detailed Somatic Variant Table:
<<somatic_table>>
Insert Keywords: Place keywords .docx template want corresponding data appear.Example:
Patient Information:
<<patient_info>>

Summary Somatic Variants:
<<summary_somatic>>

Detailed Somatic Variant Table:
<<somatic_table>>Example:Formatting: Ensure placeholders surrounded double angle brackets (<< >>) match exact keyword names.Formatting: Ensure placeholders surrounded double angle brackets (<< >>) match exact keyword names.Save .docx: Save template .docx file upload using Upload custom template option application.Save .docx: Save template .docx file upload using Upload custom template option application.
code:
Patient Information:
<<patient_info>>

Summary of Somatic Variants:
<<summary_somatic>>

Detailed Somatic Variant Table:
<<somatic_table>>

heading: Notes and Best Practices
text: Mandatory Placeholders: placeholders, like <<patient_info>>, essential generating meaningful report. Ensure included template.Optional Placeholders: certain data (e.g., <<fusion_table>>) available patient, placeholder replaced default message.Testing: Test template sample data ensure placeholders replaced correctly.Styling: Use institutionвҖҷs branding formatting guidelines style template.guidance ensures users can create custom templates tailored specific needs maintaining compatibility applicationвҖҷs reporting system.

heading: Variant Calling
text:
Variant Calling module divided two submodules: Somatic Variant Calling Germline Variant Calling. submodules allow users review, filter, select variants analysis reporting. module provides interactive tables, filtering options, visualizations streamline review process.
submodules provide powerful tools reviewing, filtering, selecting variants exploring reporting interactive tables, advanced filtering options, integrated visualizations.

heading: Interactive data tables
text:
variant data displayed using reactable package, providing fully interactive tables real-time responsiveness:Sorting: Click column header sort data ascending descending orderBuilt-filtering: Use search boxes within column filter data --flyResizable columns: Adjust column widths dragging column bordersMulti-column operations: Combine filters sorts across multiple columns simultaneouslyTip: Hold Shift key clicking column headers sort multiple columns simultaneously.
clear sorting, hold Shift click вҖ” order cycles ascending вҶ’ descending вҶ’ unsorted.

heading: Filtering Menu
text:
interactive table provides basic filtering capabilities, dedicated filtering menu offers sophisticated filtering options parameters require specific logic:Gene Region: Filter specifically exon splice regions (possible standard column filters)Consequence: Select multiple consequence typesCoverage Depth: Set minimum coverage thresholdsPopulation Frequency: Filter gnomAD allele frequenciesClinVar Significance: (Germline ) Filter variants clinical significanceCustom Column Selection: Show hide columns focus relevant data::: {.alert .alert-warning} Default Filters Applied:
first view data, following filters automatically applied ensure optimal performance focus relevant variants:gnomAD_NFE вүӨ 0.01 (rare variants )
coverage_depth > 10 (sufficient read support)
Consequence вү  "synonymous_variant" (exclude silent mutations)
gene_region == "exon" "splice" (coding regions )
:::::: {.alert .alert-success} Performance Tip:
Apply filters reviewing marking variants. Working filtered subset significantly reduces data reload times keeps application responsive.
:::

heading: Integrated Genome Viewer (IGV)
text: Validate variants read level seamless IGV integration:Multi-Patient Analysis: Select multiple patients simultaneously comparative viewingDirect Launch: Open IGV directly module variants pre-loadedRead-Level Validation: Inspect sequencing reads, coverage, alignment qualityContext Visualization: View variants genomic context annotations

heading: Somatic Variant Calling
text: somatic submodule designed analyzing tumor-specific variants specialized metrics visualizations:Key Features:Tumor Metrics: Variant allele frequency (VAF) tumor sequencing depthCancer Databases: Filter COSMIC CGC_Somatic annotations

text: histogram displays distribution tumor variant allele frequencies (VAF) across somatic variants. Selected variants marked blue lines.
